meta.title: AI Systems Case Studies — Wilfred Morgan | AI Agent Deployment & Architecture
meta.description: Case studies and architecture work from enterprise AI implementations — agentic AI deployment, RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, and AI-driven SDLC transformation in regulated industries.

header.description: Selected architecture work, case studies, and deployed systems. All enterprise engagements are anonymized. Metrics are real.

projects.title: The Sovereign Council
projects.summary: Principal Architect and systems engineer for a 13-agent, multi-tier AI orchestration system operating across strategy, legal, venture, financial intelligence, and digital build execution. L4–L5 Dark Factory maturity. Zero human operator touchpoints between task and delivery.

projects.title: Enterprise AI Transformation
projects.summary: Enterprise AI transformation for a Fortune 500 organization. Designed and deployed a multi-agent orchestration architecture using Azure OpenAI and Semantic Kernel, compressing an 18-month AI implementation roadmap into a 90-day execution plan. Delivered autonomous AI agent pipelines reducing manual workflow overhead by over 70%.

projects.title: Dark Factory Methodology
projects.summary: Proprietary framework for designing autonomous, AI-orchestrated operational pipelines at L4–L5 maturity. Documents the architecture, agent taxonomy, and deployment protocols for zero-touchpoint delivery systems.
